market_context.trigger: Kevin Warsh Fed Chair nomination - hawkish policy concerns
market_context.original_text: Kevin Warsh is historically viewed as a 'hawk,' meaning he typically prioritizes low inflation and sound money over aggressive stimulus. A Warsh-led Fed would likely move away from the 'lower for longer' interest rate philosophy.

global_risks.description: Trump 행정부의 중국산 60% 관세 및 보편관세 10-20% 부과로 글로벌 공급망 분절화 및 인플레이션 재점화 위험
global_risks.mitigation: 내수 중심 기업 비중 확대, 관세 영향 낮은 서비스 섹터 선호
global_risks.original_text: Donald Trump has proposed a universal baseline tariff (10-20%) on all imports and a specific 60%+ tariff on Chinese goods. Most economists suggest it will increase inflation. Estimates range from a 0.1% to 1.0% temporary spike in CPI. GDP Impact: Negative for GDP due to higher costs (-0.5% to -1.5% of GDP).

global_risks.description: 유럽 재무장 비용 증가로 유로존 성장 둔화, 에너지 인프라 전환 지연 시 에너지 가격 변동성 확대
global_risks.mitigation: 유럽 비중 축소, 방산 및 에너지 섹터 선별적 투자
global_risks.original_text: By 2026, many EU nations will be reaching the peak of their re-armament cycles. This 'permanent war economy' shift diverts capital from social infrastructure to defense, potentially slowing Eurozone GDP growth. 2026 marks a deadline for many European countries to fully sunset long-term Russian gas contracts.

global_risks.description: 후티 반군 공격으로 홍해 운송 차질 지속, 이란 직접 충돌 시 유가 $100+ 급등으로 글로벌 경기침체 촉발 가능
global_risks.mitigation: 에너지 섹터 헤지, 물류비 상승 수혜 기업 검토
global_risks.original_text: If Houthi attacks in the Red Sea or instability in the Strait of Hormuz persist into 2026, the permanent rerouting of ships around the Cape of Good Hope will become baked into global shipping costs. A direct confrontation involving Iran remains the 'black swan' event for 2026. A sustained spike in oil prices above $100/barrel would likely trigger a global recession.

global_risks.risk_name: Kevin Warsh Fed 의장 지명 - 긴축 우려
global_risks.description: Warsh의 매파적 성향으로 고금리 장기화 우려. 'Fed Put' 약화로 시장 하방 지지력 감소
global_risks.mitigation: 듀레이션 축소, 배당주 및 방어주 비중 확대
global_risks.original_text: Under Warsh, markets might expect less 'Fed Put' (the idea that the Fed will cut rates just to save the stock market). Warsh may advocate for a higher 'R-star' (the neutral interest rate), meaning interest rates would likely remain higher than the historical averages seen in the 2010s. Generally, a hawkish Fed Chair who prioritizes price stability and higher rates tends to support a stronger U.S. dollar.

global_risks.description: 2026년 약 $2조 규모의 기업부채 만기 집중. 2021년 저금리 차입의 고금리 차환으로 좀비기업 디폴트 증가 예상
global_risks.mitigation: 투자등급 채권 선호, CRE/소매업 섹터 회피
global_risks.original_text: According to S&P Global Ratings, approximately $1.8 trillion to $2 trillion in global corporate debt is scheduled to mature in 2026. Many of these companies issued 5-year debt in 2021 at rates of 3%-5%; they are now looking at refinancing at 7%-9% or higher. S&P Global estimates that a significant percentage of 'B-' and 'CCC' rated issuers will see their interest expenses double.

global_risks.description: 오피스 가치 20-40% 하락으로 리파이낸싱 불가, 'Jingle Mail' (키 반납) 증가. 지역은행 노출도 높음
global_risks.mitigation: CRE 관련 채권/REIT 회피, 지역은행 익스포저 점검
global_risks.original_text: Trillions in CRE loans mature through 2026. With office valuations down 20%-40% in many metros, many properties no longer have the equity to support a refinancing, leading to 'jingle mail' (handing keys back to lenders). Specific sectors—particularly Commercial Real Estate (CRE) and Retail—could see default rates spike toward 10% in the 2025-2026 window.

global_risks.description: 연준 대차대조표 축소로 시장 유동성 감소. 2025년 H1-H2 QT 종료 예상이나 불확실성 존재
global_risks.mitigation: 유동성 높은 대형주 선호, 소형주/신흥국 비중 조절
global_risks.original_text: The consensus among primary dealers surveyed by the NY Fed is that QT will likely end in Q2 or Q3 of 2025. The balance sheet, which peaked at nearly $9 trillion, is expected to bottom out somewhere between $6.5 trillion and $7 trillion. If the Secured Overnight Financing Rate (SOFR) begins to trade consistently above the Interest on Reserve Balances (IORB) rate, it signals that liquidity is becoming scarce.

sources.name: NY Fed Survey of Primary Dealers

global_risks.description: AI 관련 기업 밸류에이션 과열 우려. ROI 검증 실패 시 반도체/테크 섹터 급락 가능
global_risks.original_text: Leading up to the crash, there was growing skepticism regarding the 'AI bubble.' Disappointing earnings from U.S. tech firms like Intel and concerns over the return on investment for AI infrastructure led to a massive sell-off in the chip sector, which hit the Korean market particularly hard.

bull_case.title: 강세 시나리오 - 골디락스 복귀
bull_case.trigger: 인플레이션 안정 + 무역갈등 완화 + Fed 완화 전환
key_assumptions: 중동 정세 안정화, 유가 $70 이하 유지
Warsh Fed 의장이 예상보다 온건한 정책 시행
bull_case.portfolio_impact: 위험자산 강세. 주식 +15~20%, 신흥국 +20% 이상 가능
bull_case.original_text: If the Federal Reserve begins a steady cutting cycle in late 2024/2025, the 'wall' becomes much more manageable. Private equity firms hold record amounts of cash ($2 trillion+) and may choose to inject equity into their portfolio companies to prevent defaults.

base_case.title: 기본 시나리오 - 불확실성 지속
key_assumptions: 미-중 무역갈등 지속되나 극단적 확대는 회피
Fed 금리 동결 또는 소폭 인하 (25-50bp)
base_case.portfolio_impact: 변동성 확대 속 완만한 상승. 주식 +5~10%, 채권 +3~5%
base_case.original_text: 2026 will not necessarily be a 'crash,' but it will be a 'great weeding out.' Companies with strong cash flows will survive by paying more for their debt, while over-leveraged firms that relied on 0% interest rates will likely face restructuring or bankruptcy.

bear_case.title: 약세 시나리오 - 복합 위기
bear_case.trigger: 지정학 악화 + 신용경색 + 경기침체 동시 발생
key_assumptions: 미-중 60% 관세 전면 시행, 보복관세 확대
Warsh Fed 강경 긴축으로 고금리 장기화
AI 버블 붕괴로 테크 섹터 30%+ 하락
bear_case.portfolio_impact: 위험자산 급락. 주식 -20~30%, 신용스프레드 급등, 신흥국 위기
bear_case.asset_allocation: 방어적 배분 (주식 30% 이하, 국채/현금 50%+), 금 비중 확대
bear_case.original_text: A direct confrontation involving Iran remains the 'black swan' event for 2026. A sustained spike in oil prices above $100/barrel would likely trigger a global recession, as central banks would be forced to keep interest rates high despite slowing growth. Bloomberg Economics estimates that a 60% tariff on China could reduce U.S. GDP by 0.5% to 0.8% by 2026.

defensive_actions: CRE/소매업 섹터 익스포저 점검 및 축소
opportunistic_actions: 변동성 확대 시 우량주 분할 매수
투자등급 회사채 스프레드 확대 시 매수 기회
